data_description.enable_historical_import: When enabled, the integration imports historical energy records from the CM160 device into Home Assistant statistics. Disable if you do not need past data or want to reduce database load.
data_description.voltage_entity: Select a sensor that provides the grid voltage (e.g. from a smart meter or energy monitor). Leave empty to use the fixed default voltage below.
data_description.voltage: Grid voltage in Volts used to calculate power (W) and energy (kWh) from the measured current. Typical values: 230 V (Europe), 120 V (North America). Only used when no voltage entity is selected above.
